scripts.setup: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 16 >/dev/null 2>&1 || nvm install 16; yarn install --ignore-engines

launch.command: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 16 >/dev/null 2>&1 || nvm install 16; yarn --ignore-engines storybook:start --ci
